{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sector Eight
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Reinforcements from [[Sector Eight]] were denied entrance into [[Sector Seven]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
